description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 8. Gap markers and session-phase organization**.

Goal: add chronology/readability regressions showing gap markers and phase markers improve understanding in the single-session model without drifting into thread semantics.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/format.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- integration scenarios under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration`

Worker notes:
- include long-gap and resumed-work scenarios, not just phase changes
- assert readability/ordering behavior in the final rendered context
- keep cases reusable for future temporal/lifecycle refinements
title: Add chronology/readability tests for gap and phase markers in the single-session model
